scripts.build:
node gen-icons.mjs && esbuild index.js --bundle --format=esm --outfile=bundle.js --minify && cp -r node_modules/@carbon/icons/svg assets/icons && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),l=fs.readFileSync('node_modules/@carbon/styles/css/styles.css','utf8').split('
');fs.writeFileSync('assets/themes.css','/* Carbon theme tokens (generated) */
'+l.slice(2786,4107).join('
'));fs.writeFileSync('assets/grid.css','/* Carbon CSS grid (generated) */
'+l.slice(1063,1862).join('
'));"
